ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date and time of the stock data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The volume of stocks traded during the day */,
  "BOP" TEXT /* The balance of power indicator value */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the stock data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* The quality of the stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator calculation */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date and time the indicator was calculated */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The stock identifier the indicator is associated with */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* The name of the technical indicator */,
  "value" TEXT /* The calculated value of the technical indicator */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* The methodology used to calculate the indicator */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level in the calculated indicator value */,
  "used_in_alert" INTEGER /* Whether the indicator is used in any alert settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES stock_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol used in trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* The name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (e.g., price, indicator) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* The condition that triggers the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* The status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, expired) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* The date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* The method used to notify the user when the alert is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The stock in the portfolio */,
  "position_size" TEXT /* The size of the position in the stock */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* The price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* The date and time the stock was purchased */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* The custom name of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* The type of portfolio (e.g., long-term, short-term, experimental) */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* The benchmark or reference point for the portfolio's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
